name: engine
description: The pure deterministic reducer (/engine, ADR-000 D1).

name: content
description: Inert hash-addressed content data: maps, templates, dictionaries (/content).

name: shell
description: A shell hosting the core: stdio now, HTTP/spectator later (/shell, ADR-000 D8).

name: agent
description: Player agents: scripted, centaur, or LLM (/agent).

name: parser
description: The quarantined freeform-to-canonical dictionary parser (ADR-000 D3).

name: ci
description: GitHub Actions workflows, determinism guard, showcase job.

name: docs
description: GDD, ADRs, CONTRIBUTING, and other documentation.

name: feature
description: A new mechanic, system, or content change serving a pillar.

name: tuning
description: A difficulty-knob or content-value change backed by evidence (GDD §3).

name: determinism
description: Touches replay reproducibility or the determinism laws (ADR-000 D5).

name: unfair-death
description: engine.unfair must stay at zero — the highest-priority bug class (GDD §5.7).

name: adr-needed
description: A decision that must be recorded in an ADR before or alongside this work.

name: blocked
description: Cannot proceed until a dependency is resolved.

name: good-first-issue
description: A well-scoped entry point for a first contribution.
